## Verification

### Automated checks

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Coverage gate
- [ ] Production build

### Product controls

- [ ] Positive control
- [ ] Negative control
- [ ] Recovery or partial-failure control
- [ ] Regression for the original defect
- [ ] Realistic scale test, when relevant
- [ ] Real route, job, cron, or user path
- [ ] Fresh-context review

| Subsystem | Evidence | Result |
|---|---|---|
